title: noronhia louvelii
intro: Noronhia louvelii, also known as the Madagascar Ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Noronhia louvelii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark is often used to make a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
